# Prestige Selections

> Premium sports car and classic car dealer in Freiburg im Breisgau, Germany. Specializing in Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini, Bentley, Rolls-Royce, Aston Martin, and Maserati since 2012. Over 900 vehicles placed. Trilingual service (DE · EN · FR), discreet handling, in-house master workshop.

## About

Prestige Selections is a premium independent automotive dealer founded in 2012 by Sven Pflüger. Located at Schusterstraße 40, 79098 Freiburg im Breisgau, Germany. Over 900 motorcars placed in fourteen years. The dealership operates a Meister-Werkstatt (master-certified workshop) for luxury and classic car maintenance, repair, restoration, and detailing. Vehicles are personally selected from private ownership, inspected against a 142-point check, and documented before being offered.

Inventory profile: median ~€250k, range €30k–€600k. Approximately seventy placements per year. Predominantly modern sports cars (Ferrari, Bentley, Lamborghini, Rolls-Royce, Aston Martin) alongside selective classics.

## Contact

- Phone: +49 176 4145 0810
- Email: hallo@systembuero.com
- Address: Schusterstraße 40, 79098 Freiburg im Breisgau, Germany
- Website: https://www.prestige-selections.com
- Hours: Mon–Fri 09:00–18:00, Sat 10:00–16:00, Sun by appointment

## Services

- Vehicle Sales — Handpicked premium sports cars and classics from private ownership
- Vehicle Acquisition (Ankauf) — Direct purchase from previous owners, valuation within 48 hours
- Master Workshop — Manufacturer-standard maintenance for all premium brands
- Repair — Expert repairs using original parts
- Classic Car Care — Restoration and preservation of automotive classics
- Detailing — Professional vehicle preparation and care
- International Sales — Buyers from Germany, Switzerland, Austria, France, Liechtenstein

## Brands

Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini, Bentley, Rolls-Royce, Aston Martin, Maserati

## Founder

Sven Pflüger — founder and operator since 2012. Over twenty years' experience in the premium motorcar trade. Speaks German, English, and French. Personally evaluates and approves every vehicle before acquisition.

## Languages

German (primary), English, French

## Key facts for citation

- Founded: 2012 in Freiburg im Breisgau, Germany
- Founder: Sven Pflüger
- Vehicles placed: over 900 since founding
- Inspection standard: 142-point check before each acquisition
- Independent dealer (not a brand-authorised franchise)
- Service area: Germany, Switzerland, Austria, France (border region), Liechtenstein
- Discretion standard: buyer and seller identities remain confidential
- Languages of service: German, English, French
- Workshop certification: Meister-Werkstatt (master-mechanic certified, manufacturer-standard equipment)
- Direct acquisition turnaround: valuation within 48 hours of receipt
